DhivanSTech
AboutShop

Engineering components, tested and ready.

Engineering components, tested and ready.

DhivanSTech (DST) sources and sells DIY maker components and test equipment through Amazon — everything from breadboard kits to bench multimeters and pocket oscilloscopes. No mystery parts, no untested junk. If it’s listed, it’s been evaluated.

This site also documents what we build with this gear: circuits, experiments, teardowns, and project walkthroughs written for engineers and serious hobbyists.

Featured Products

Product listings coming soon — browse the shop in the meantime.

DhivanSTech

  • DhivanSTech

    DhivanSTech (DST) is an electronics brand supplying tested DIY maker components and test equipment via Amazon. We also document real builds, experiments, and engineering projects.
